description: The DeltaTime node returns the time it took to perform the last update in seconds, clamped to a maximum value of 0.1 seconds.

fields.* ([[Type:float|float]]): The time it took to perform the last update. This value is clamped to a maximum of 0.1 seconds.

notes.title: See also
notes.text:
* SmoothDeltaTime tries to smooth out the delta time to minimize interference from stutters.
* RawDeltaTime returns the raw, unclamped update time.
